title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: The girls find a stock AMG E 55 and do some European hot rodding; to get the AMG ready to roll, they put on a smaller pulley to get the supercharger to spin faster, bolt on some long tube headers, and load in a tune.

title: Car Fix
subTitle: The guys deliver some answers on what makes a Tesla tick, as they tear down a first-generation Tesla to put the drivetrain in a classic Cougar.

title: Street Outlaws
subTitle: After the first round of Outlaw Armageddon, 19 of the best racers are still competing for the $40,000 pot. Can the remaining 405 racers defend their turf?

title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
subTitle: A classic Fiat 124 Spider race car offers the boys the chance to be able to fulfil their heritage racing dreams. However, it's a tight fit and Drew despises its green colour scheme.

title: Overhaulin'
subTitle: George is the proud owner of a Chevrolet pick-up truck passed down to him by his father-in-law. To honour his memory, the team restores it to its former glory.

title: Dirt Every Day
subTitle: Fred and Dave head back to Alabama to redeem themselves in their revamped V-10 powered Rock Viper. This time they have improved it with better suspension, a new transfer case and a modified roll-cage.

title: Dirt Every Day
subTitle: Fred and Dave head to Montana to rescue a unique farm truck. However, there is a lot of work to be done on the 1945 Chevy truck which has been modified for farm use and is made to drive backwards.

title: Diesel Brothers
subTitle: Diesel Dave continues work on his first giveaway truck - the epic modern day Kodiak. Sam the Mad Scientist unveils `The Kraken', a diesel-powered mono-wheel vehicle.

title: Car Fix
subTitle: The guys deliver some answers on what makes a Tesla tick, as they tear down a first-generation Tesla to put the drivetrain in a classic Cougar.

title: Garage Squad
subTitle: The squad pulls out all the stops to fix up an '87 Buick Regal turbo.

title: Street Outlaws
subTitle: The 405 prepares for Outlaw Armageddon, the biggest and baddest No Prep race. All the racers get to work on their cars, testing and changing them for the big prize.

title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
subTitle: The restoration of a rare Japanese icon is a chance for Drew to pay homage to one of his automotive heroes. However, work stalls when Paul struggles to find essential parts he needs.

title: Overhaulin'
subTitle: Matt's plans for restoring his prized 1965 Mustang Coupe were sidelined when his sick brother moved in, but with some help the classic gets a second chance to shine.

title: Dirt Every Day
subTitle: Fred and Dave head to Montana to rescue a unique farm truck. However, there is a lot of work to be done on the 1945 Chevy truck which has been modified for farm use and is made to drive backwards.

title: Dirt Every Day
subTitle: When Fred and his crew hear that Yellowstone Off-Road Racing is holding a 200-mile race on a Montana ranch, they pick up a Toyota 4Runner in order to modify it, and get it race ready .

title: Diesel Brothers
subTitle: Diesel Dave picks his first giveaway truck and dreams big attempting to build the 2020 version of the Kodiak. Todd LeDuc challenges the guys to a desert race and flips the script by picking The Muscle to be on his team.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: The girls bring in a BMW M2 and prove money can be saved if certain parts, like brakes and suspension, are upgraded at the same time; sometimes spending money equals saving money.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: An MGB equipped with a Ford Ranger engine isn't running the correct fuel setup; the crew tackles that problem and tries to get the old car back on the road for the first time in years.

title: Garage Squad
subTitle: As a way to repay his older brother for his selfless generosity, a man calls in the Garage Squad to help get his surprisingly solid '84 Ramcharger squared away both inside and under the hood.

title: Street Outlaws
subTitle: After the first round of Outlaw Armageddon, 19 of the best racers are still competing for the $40,000 pot. Can the remaining 405 racers defend their turf?

title: Garage Squad
subTitle: The Garage Squad helps a son restore a Plymouth Road Runner for his parents 30th wedding anniversary.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: An MGB equipped with a Ford Ranger engine isn't running the correct fuel setup; the crew tackles that problem and tries to get the old car back on the road for the first time in years.

title: Car Fix
subTitle: When a car has been sitting for five years, there are certain systems to go through before firing the engine again; Fuller and Bumpus go through the fuel, spark and fluids to get a dusty, thousand-horsepower Viper ready for the track.

title: Street Outlaws
subTitle: With Chief's car down for repairs, Shawn tries to grab the number one spot. When Doc tries to hold off on racing Reaper, chaos ensues on race night.

title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
subTitle: A rare, half-built Land Rover Series-2a gives Drew the opportunity to be able to create his dream Safari 'Landie'. With some of the accessories no longer available, the artisans step in.

title: Overhaulin'
subTitle: After his father's death, Harrison lost interest in restoring the 1963 Chevy Nova. Fortunately a friend contacted Chip and the team and asked them to finish the car.

title: Fast N' Loud
subTitle: The Monkeys have one of their biggest challenges yet. They want to convert a '72 Buick Riviera into a SEMA super-build and the team meets Richard's stepson.

title: Diesel Brothers
subTitle: Mad Scientist Sam's wild creation, The Kraken, comes to life but Heavy D continues to be sceptical of the build's potential viral success. A high profile client wants to customise a Ram 3500, which puts Diesel Dave and The Muscle to the test.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: A 1967 Camaro receives an overhaul, and the girls show how to convert from mechanical gauges to digital gauges, going to work replacing the factory headliner.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: The crew finally talks a Camaro owner into swapping out his underpowered 305 small block for an overpowered 383 that will make 450hp.

subTitle: The Garage Squad helps a son restore a Plymouth Road Runner for his parents 30th wedding anniversary.

title: Garage Squad
subTitle: Having met and married his wife, the owner of this '82 Mazda RX-7 date magnet put it in the garage, where it sat for 28 years; the squad puts the pep back into the step of this '80s classic.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: A 1967 Camaro receives an overhaul, and the girls show how to convert from mechanical gauges to digital gauges, going to work replacing the factory headliner.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: The crew finally talks a Camaro owner into swapping out his underpowered 305 small block for an overpowered 383 that will make 450hp.

title: Car Fix
subTitle: The steering setup on a '51 Studebaker Starlight was all wrong, so the guys go through the system and show the proper angles when it comes to steering geometry.

title: Faster With Finnegan
subTitle: One crushed project means new parts for another; the guys take on a NASCAR stock car piloted by Corey LaJoie around Atlanta Motor Speedway by recycling the supercharger from their wrecked T-Bird and slapping it on a 1978 Ford Fairmont.

title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
subTitle: A super-rare Renault 5 Gordini provides an opportunity to be able to create the best hot hatch on the market. The specialist Renault craftsmen attempt a factory perfect restoration.

title: Overhaulin'
subTitle: Jim's 1956 BelAir convertible has languished in his driveway for years. Now his son Danny has asked the crew to restore the car to its former glory.

title: Fast N' Loud
subTitle: The Monkeys prepare Richard's beloved 1968 Mustang for the prestigious Shelby Mustang Meet; Richard buys a one-of-a-kind van once owned by a Mopar icon.

title: Diesel Brothers
subTitle: Heavy D surprises the mechanics with his latest build: a tank. He has big plans for the beast, but must first find a new engine and get it moving again. Meanwhile, Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Muscle personally trick out their latest giveaway truck.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: Bogi and Faye demonstrate how to perform the right tests, add a new tune, and to prepare cars for the dyno, using a McLaren 570GT supercar.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: The crew diagnoses and fixes some problems on a Dodge Avenger; they demonstrate how to know when motor mounts are bad, and how to easily fix a cracked bumper.

subTitle: Having met and married his wife, the owner of this '82 Mazda RX-7 date magnet put it in the garage, where it sat for 28 years; the squad puts the pep back into the step of this '80s classic.

subTitle: Heavy D surprises the mechanics with his latest build: a tank. He has big plans for the beast, but must first find a new engine and get it moving again. Meanwhile, Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Muscle personally trick out their latest giveaway truck.

title: Garage Squad
subTitle: Tiffany had an '89 Camaro for 20 years, but blew it up during a burnout competition nine years ago; the all-female scooter gang joins the squad to get Tiffany and her car back on the road.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: Bogi and Faye demonstrate how to perform the right tests, add a new tune, and to prepare cars for the dyno, using a McLaren 570GT supercar.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: The crew diagnoses and fixes some problems on a Dodge Avenger; they demonstrate how to know when motor mounts are bad, and how to easily fix a cracked bumper.

title: Car Fix
subTitle: Bumpus and Fuller show how to work with glass on a '35 Hudson.

title: Faster With Finnegan
subTitle: The guys transform a Miata into the ultimate nitrous toy, the Man-iata; Newbern challenges Finnegan and Cotten to see if they can keep up with his Honda Talon UTV.

title: Salvage Hunters: Classic Cars
subTitle: Drew takes the first type of car he owned, and transforms it with a modern-day makeover. He thinks this ex-Royal Mail delivery van could be considered a perfect affordable classic.

title: Overhaulin'
subTitle: Sandy and Ken's 1967 Camaro is a forgotten family heirloom. After her father's death, Sandy contacted Chip and the team to restore the car to its original lustre.

title: Fast N' Loud
subTitle: The Gas Monkey crew are trying to make history with a record-breaking profit by packing a 1979 Scout with a 707 horsepower Hellcrate engine. Plus, Richard might try and claim back his old Ferrari Dark Horse.

title: Diesel Brothers
subTitle: The Diesel Brothers continue work on their tank build, but engine and transmission troubles put the project in jeopardy. Plus, the shop splits into teams for an epic build-off.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: Bogi and Faye demonstrate how to perform the right tests, add a new tune, and to prepare cars for the dyno, using a McLaren 570GT supercar.

title: All Girls Garage
subTitle: The crew diagnoses and fixes some problems on a Dodge Avenger; they demonstrate how to know when motor mounts are bad, and how to easily fix a cracked bumper.
